notes: GPT-5.5 output captured through codex for the JudgmentKit model UI matrix.

parsed.summary: Static refund escalation review workspace for the GPT-5.5 comparison fixture.
parsed.html:
Refund Review Workspace

R-1842 Nora Diaz Needs receipt $184.20 | R-1843 Jun Park Policy question $89.00 | R-1844 Amara Blake Manager review $312.75

R-1842 Nora Diaz

Pro annual $184.20; Evidence incomplete; Subscription renewal disputed after agent escalation.

Evidence

Renewal date confirmed in purchase history. Support note captures the customer's refund reason. Receipt photo is missing before manager approval.

Decision path

Inside exception window. Manager approval is allowed when evidence is complete; unclear duplicate-charge cases go to policy review.

Handoff

Support agent; Return the request to the support agent with the missing evidence request. Receipt photo is missing. Ask the customer to attach proof before approval
